name: opl-bookforge
description: Codex plugin carrier for the OPL Book Forge domain app.

interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex plugin carrier for OPL Book Forge while preserving manuscript truth, quality/export verdicts, and owner-gated publication authority in the domain repo.
defaultPrompt: Use OPL Book Forge to shape a book storyline, chapter package, manuscript, proof, or export handoff.
Use OPL Book Forge to inspect owner-gated book delivery evidence.
